message:
feat(batch): implement speculative batching infrastructure (12 Balls)

The "12 Balls" optimization: load weights once, process N tokens.
Amortizes 50ms weight loading across 5 tokens → 10ms/token effective.

Metal kernel batch support:
- encodeExpertFFN_Q2K_HybridFromSoftmaxBatched() accepts batch_size param
- 2D dispatch: threadgroups = {n_ff, batch_size, 1}
- Kernel correctly uses tgpig.x=neuron, tgpig.y=token_in_batch
- Added moe_expert_weighted_add_from_buffer_batched for parallel weight add

Batched forward pass (mixtral_lazy.zig):
- forwardBatchTokens(tokens[], positions[], batch_logits[][])
- speculativeDecodeBatch() - draft K tokens then verify

Benchmark update (bench_mixtral.zig):
- --spec flag for speculative batching mode
- Drafts 5 tokens per round, tracks acceptance rate
- Reports speculative stats: rounds, accepted, acceptance %

Key insight: Q2K kernels already support batch via:
  batch_input_offset = batch_idx * n_embd
  output_idx = batch_idx * n_ff + row_idx
